/usr/bin/c++ CMakeFiles/build.dir/c/build.cpp.o CMakeFiles/build.dir/usr/src/tensorrt/samples/common/logger.cpp.o -o build  /usr/lib/aarch64-linux-gnu/libnvinfer.so /usr/lib/aarch64-linux-gnu/libnvinfer_plugin.so /usr/lib/aarch64-linux-gnu/libnvparsers.so /usr/lib/aarch64-linux-gnu/libnvonnxparser.so
